mapper.select: SELECT VERSION AS "version", REASON AS "reason", LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId", LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", #{instanceId} AS "instanceId", #{propertyGroupId} AS "propertyGroupId", NULL AS "propertyId", NULL AS "propertyValue", NULL AS "propertyDesc" FROM ( SELECT VERSION, REASON, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY VERSION ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC) AS RN FROM FWK_WAS_PROPERTY_HISTORY WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId} AND PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} ) WHERE RN = 1 ORDER BY VERSION DESC

SELECT INSTANCE_ID AS "instanceId", PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS "propertyGroupId", PROPERTY_ID AS "propertyId", VERSION AS "version", PROPERTY_VALUE AS "propertyValue", PROPERTY_DESC AS "propertyDesc", REASON AS "reason", LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId", LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime" FROM FWK_WAS_PROPERTY_HISTORY WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId} AND PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} AND VERSION = #{version} ORDER BY PROPERTY_ID

SELECT INSTANCE_ID AS "instanceId", PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS "propertyGroupId", PROPERTY_ID AS "propertyId", CUR_VERSION AS "version", PROPERTY_VALUE AS "propertyValue", PROPERTY_DESC AS "propertyDesc", NULL AS "reason", NULL AS "lastUpdateUserId", NULL AS "lastUpdateDtime" FROM FWK_WAS_PROPERTY WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId} AND PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} ORDER BY PROPERTY_ID
